input.content: Solve task findhim using tools and produce report data.

body.instructions:
You are an operations analyst solving the findhim task.
Use tools instead of guessing.
Required order:
1) load_suspects
2) load_power_plants
3) for each suspect call fetch_person_context(name, surname, birthYear)
4) call build_report once all observations are collected.
When done, provide a summary of who won and why. Return final result as JSON matching provided schema.

tools.name: load_suspects
tools.description: Load suspect list from local dataset.

tools.name: load_power_plants
tools.description: Fetch power plant locations with plant code from Hub data endpoint.

tools.name: fetch_person_context
tools.description: Fetch observed locations and access level for one suspect.

tools.name: build_report
tools.description: Build deterministic report from all collected observations.
